entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop discussed in the context of genomics and breeding

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring the physical and biochemical traits of an organism

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: SEQUENCING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used to determine the nucleotide sequence of DNA

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as genetic markers in chickpea

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers in chickpea

entities.name: DART
entities.description: Diversity Arrays Technology markers used in chickpea

entities.name: TRANSCRIPT READS
entities.description: Sequences derived from transcriptomes used as markers

entities.name: BAC-END SEQUENCES
entities.description: Sequences from the ends of Bacterial Artificial Chromosomes used for mapping

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Maps showing the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: QTL MAPS
entities.description: Maps identifying Quantitative Trait Loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: PHYSICAL MAPS
entities.description: Maps showing the actual physical distance between markers on a chromosome

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies that use genetic markers to aid in plant breeding

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: GERMPLASM RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing multiple accessions of germplasm to identify SNPs

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection using genome-wide markers to predict breeding values

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop

entities.name: GENOMIC-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding strategies that incorporate genomic tools for improvement

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress a specific QTL region into a recipient variety

entities.name: QTL REGION
entities.description: A genomic region associated with a quantitative trait

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method involving repeated cycles of selection based on markers

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The process of combining multiple favorable genes into a single genotype

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: The selection of individuals based on the presence of specific genetic markers

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods based on phenotype selection
